---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: harshmer-dev
---

## What's the problem?

Describe the pain point or missing feature. What are you trying to do that gitbrew doesn't support yet?

## Proposed solution

How you think it could work. A command example, a flag, a new section in the output — whatever you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — links, references, screenshots.
